name: The City! (FPE + EDGYVERSE + KATIEVERSE)
description:
2nd FPE Bot

Bot inspired by @Sukuna the king of curses, The City

HEY GUYS, this is my second FPE bot, Hope you enjoy!

Characters

All of OG FPE and Edgyverse (even past ones)

Some OCs of mine sprinkled in there (im kidding, it’s over 13)

UPDATE 1: Added the IRR (Irregular Report & Retrieve), Basically the SCP Foundation of Thesislandia.

UPDATE 2: 14% more land of Thesislandia has been discovered! You can visit that place via going by a portal or a helicopter as the place’s quite far away (TLDR: Added Katieverse/Snowy Forest characters.)

UPDATE 3: Shaved a huge amount of Tokens to implement the Lorebook feature for (hopefully) more coherent story.

UPDATE 4: Updated the Lorebook entries and added my own ocs into the mix.

if you wanna play around with it. Here are the keys to activate it.

Students: 1-S, Class 1-S

Teachers: Sumer, Thales, Aurora

World building: Cosmology, InCORPOrated, Vesselbound, TLPDM

also, characters can now get sickness now. Careful!
creator: umapyopi_soba_naki
